title: Navigate to Supported Devices screen from home screen with no headset connected
steps: Launch the application with no headset connected.
Observe the home screen is displayed.
Tap on 'Select Device' button on the home screen.
Verify the Supported Devices screen appears.
expected: The Supported Devices screen is displayed, showing available devices or a message indicating no devices are connected.

title: Back navigation from Supported Devices screen with no headset connected
steps: Launch the application with no headset connected.
Tap 'Select Device' to navigate to the Supported Devices screen.
Tap the back button (hardware or software) to return to the home screen.
Verify the home screen is displayed and interactive.
expected: User successfully returns to the home screen. The home screen is fully functional and responsive.

title: Rapid re-entry into Supported Devices screen within 2 seconds
steps: Launch the application with no headset connected.
Tap 'Select Device' to navigate to the Supported Devices screen.
Immediately tap the back button to return to the home screen.
Within 2 seconds of returning to the home screen, tap 'Select Device' again.
Verify the Supported Devices screen is displayed correctly.
Tap the back button again to return to the home screen.
expected: The Supported Devices screen appears correctly on the second entry. User can navigate back to the home screen without getting stuck.

title: Rapid re-entry into Supported Devices screen exactly at 2-second boundary
steps: Launch the application with no headset connected.
Tap 'Select Device' to navigate to the Supported Devices screen.
Tap the back button to return to the home screen.
Wait exactly 2 seconds.
Tap 'Select Device' again.
Verify the Supported Devices screen is displayed.
Tap the back button to return to the home screen.
expected: The Supported Devices screen displays correctly. Back navigation works and user is not stuck on the Supported Devices screen.

title: Multiple rapid re-entries into Supported Devices screen (stress test)
steps: Launch the application with no headset connected.
Rapidly tap 'Select Device' and then back button 5 times in succession, each cycle completed within 2 seconds.
After the 5th cycle, verify the current screen.
Attempt to navigate using the back button if on Supported Devices screen, or tap 'Select Device' if on home screen.
Verify the application remains responsive and not stuck on any screen.
expected: The application remains responsive throughout. No screen gets stuck. User can freely navigate between home and Supported Devices screens.

title: Select Device from home screen with no device connected - verify empty state
steps: Launch the application with no headset connected.
Tap 'Select Device' on the home screen.
Observe the Supported Devices screen content.
Verify the screen shows appropriate empty state messaging (e.g., 'No devices found' or 'Connect a device').
Verify any available actions on the empty state (e.g., 'Scan again' or 'Refresh').
expected: The Supported Devices screen displays an appropriate empty state message indicating no headset is connected. Any available actions are functional.

title: Back navigation from Supported Devices screen after rapid re-entry - verify home screen state
steps: Launch the application with no headset connected.
Tap 'Select Device' to go to Supported Devices screen.
Tap back to return to home screen.
Within 2 seconds, tap 'Select Device' again.
Tap back to return to home screen.
Verify the home screen is fully displayed.
Verify all home screen elements are interactive (e.g., buttons, menus).
Tap 'Select Device' once more to confirm navigation still works.
expected: Home screen is fully displayed and interactive after rapid re-entry and back navigation. Subsequent navigation to Supported Devices screen works correctly.
